column3: Investigate whether current-tab navigation can enter a topic without invoking handleRouteChange/continueMainTopicBrowsingSession, leaving the session stuck.
column4: Route listener or initialization misses the topic route after navigation.
column22: {"id":"H1","status":"refuted","findings":"常规当前 Tab 导航链路未发现会绕过 handleRouteChange/continueMainTopicBrowsingSession 的静态路径。startReadingMainTopics 保存会话后通过 navigateToMainTopicFromHome 点击首页链接或 location.assign 进入话题；SPA 路径由已安装的 pushState/replaceState/popstate 监听调度 handleRouteChange，整页跳转路径则在脚本启动时 initialize 直接调用 handleRouteChange。handleRouteChange 在新 route signature 下会在 UI 初始化/自动阅读后调用 continueMainTopicBrowsingSession。因此“路由监听或初始化遗漏话题 route 导致卡住”在当前代码和测试覆盖下不成立。","evidence_for":"弱证据：navigateToMainTopicFromHome 只执行 link.click 或 navigate(topic.url)，自身没有直接调用 handleRouteChange/continueMainTopicBrowsingSession，续跑依赖后续路由监听或新页面初始化，见 userscripts/flowreader.user.js:728、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:736、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:742。测试也主要直接调用 handleRouteChange/continueMainTopicBrowsingSession，未直接验证 installRouteChangeListeners 对真实点击后的 Discourse SPA 事件，见 userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:507、userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:528。","evidence_against":"installRouteChangeListeners 在脚本启动时先于 initialize 安装，覆盖 history.pushState、history.replaceState 和 popstate，并调度 handleRouteChange，见 userscripts/flowreader.user.js:908、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:917、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:926、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1873。initialize 会直接 await handleRouteChange，覆盖 location.assign/整页加载后的话题入口，见 userscripts/flowreader.user.js:931、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:938、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1878。handleRouteChange 对新 topic/home signature 会调用 continueMainTopicBrowsingSession，见 userscripts/flowreader.user.js:832、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:844、userscripts/flowreader.user.js:879。测试验证切到新话题会处理 route 并自动阅读、不可用话题会进入主帖兜底、同一话题重复触发才跳过，见 userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:507、userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:528、userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:557；continueMainTopicBrowsingSession 的话题页记录并返回来源页路径也有测试，见 userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:360。"}

column3: Investigate whether handleRouteChange waits too long or returns before continuation when topic context/timeline is slow but not unavailable.
column4: waitForPageContext prevents continuation from returning to home on slow topic pages.
column22: {"id":"H2","status":"confirmed","findings":"确认但带边界：`handleRouteChange` 在话题路由会先等待 `waitForPageContext`，主帖续跑 `continueMainTopicBrowsingSession` 位于其后，因此慢加载话题会阻塞返回首页续跑；如果超过默认 10s 且页面未被识别为不可用，会直接抛错，续跑不会执行。若上下文在超时前可用，则只是延迟，后续仍会执行续跑。","evidence_for":"`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:800-817` 显示 `waitForPageContext` 默认 `timeout = 10000`，轮询 `syncRuntimeState()`，未拿到 context 就继续 `setTimeout`，超时 reject。`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:850-857` 中话题路由先 `await waitForContext`；catch 后只有 `isTopicUnavailablePage` 为真才吞掉错误，否则 throw。`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:879-893` 的 `continueMainTopics` 在等待、同步、UI、可选 `startReading` 之后才调用。`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1643-1751` 证明返回首页动作在 `continueMainTopicBrowsingSession` 内完成，尤其 `1744-1750` 保存会话、delay 后 `returnToMainTopicSource`。测试 `userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:528-555` 只覆盖不可用话题 reject 后推进 fallback，未覆盖慢但最终可用或超时但非不可用场景。","evidence_against":"并非所有慢加载都会永久阻止：如果 `waitForContext` 成功解析上下文，`handleRouteChange` 会继续到 `continueMainTopics`；测试 `userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:507-525` 覆盖了立即 resolve 的话题路由正常初始化。首页路由不会等待话题上下文，见 `userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:155-174`。单独测试 `userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:333-384` 证明只要直接进入 `continueMainTopicBrowsingSession` 且 CSRF 可用，会记录主帖并 `historyBack`。"}

column3: Investigate whether sendMainTopicTiming/fetch can hang indefinitely after topic loads, preventing returnToMainTopicSource.
column4: The /topics/timings fetch has no timeout and can leave the user on the topic page.
column22: {"id":"H3","status":"confirmed","findings":"确认：主帖话题页流程在 `continueMainTopicBrowsingSession` 中先 `await sendMainTopicTiming(...)`，之后才保存会话、delay 并调用 `returnToMainTopicSource`。`sendMainTopicTiming` 直接 `await fetchImpl('/topics/timings', ...)`，请求 options 未传 `signal`/AbortController，也没有 `Promise.race` 或定时超时；如果 fetch promise 一直 pending，catch/retry 不会触发，函数会停在该 await，用户可留在话题页。测试只覆盖 fetch resolve 后会返回首页，没有覆盖 pending/timeout 场景。","evidence_for":"`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1560-1572` 定义 `sendMainTopicTiming` 并直接 `await fetchImpl(.../topics/timings...)`，请求参数只有 headers/referrer/body/method/mode/credentials，无 timeout/signal；`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1702-1705` 在话题页流程中 await 该函数；`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1743-1747` 的 `delayImpl` 和 `returnToMainTopicSource` 位于该 await 之后；`userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:360-379` 使用立即 resolve 的 `fetchImpl` 并断言 history back，没有模拟永不 resolve 的 fetch。","evidence_against":"`userscripts/flowreader.user.js:1578-1587` 只在 fetch reject/throw 后重试并最终返回 false，说明失败响应路径会继续推进；但这不处理一直 pending 的 fetch。`userscripts/tests/flowreader.user.test.js:411-436` 不可用话题页会跳过 fetch 并返回，但不适用于正常话题页请求挂起。"}
